Sign up Free

Help customers instantly with an AI-driven multi-agent chatbot

Chatsistant is a comprehensive conversational AI framework platform with collaboration tools, powered by advanced LLMs, including OpenAI‘s GPT-4o, GPT-4o-mini, GPT-o1, GPT-o3 mini, Google’s Gemini 1.5 Pro and Gemini 2.0 Flash, Anthropic‘s Claude 3.5 Haiku and Claude 3.7 Sonnet, and DeepSeek‘s R1 and V3 models. It’s designed for seamless multi-platform deployment, enabling the creation of native applications with cutting-edge AI capabilities + Zapier & Make official global partners.

Empowering companies to stand out with customer experience

ChatBot AI Assist

Your own generative AI Large Language Model framework, designed and launched in minutes without coding, based on your resources.

Driven by data,
powered by AI,
controlled By You

Standalone AI

Your AI can handle inquiries, provide personalized assistance, and even automate tasks, they become indispensable assets for businesses looking to scale and improve customer satisfaction. From basic conversations to advanced lead generation, seamlessly integrating webhooks, APIs, and native integration with platforms like Shopify, Messenger, WordPress, Wix, Square Space, and beyond, the possibilities are limitless.

Control your
bot responses

Control and organize your AI bot responses by effectively enhancing the AI’s knowledge base. With customizable brand identity options and a user-friendly interface, elevate your organization’s intelligence and decision-making capabilities. Curate, clean, enrich, and train your bot on accuracy versus hallucinations. Experience the future of AI training with us.

Multiple data sources

Chatsistant lets you train your AI chatbot using a variety of data sources for accurate, personalized responses—powered by advanced LLMs like OpenAI GPT-4o, GPT-4o-mini, Claude, Gemini, and DeepSeek. You can upload files like PDFs, Word docs, TXT, CSV, XLS, and XLSX, train with images, and add website URLs or sitemaps to be scraped and indexed. You can also input Q\&A pairs and pull transcripts from YouTube videos using the YouTube source type. When added this way, videos can be embedded directly in the chat for a seamless experience.

Easily manage and organize your data to enhance the AI’s knowledge base. Customize the chatbot’s persona, tone, and brand identity using a simple interface that helps power smarter communication and decision-making across your business.

Data secured

At Chatsistant, we’re committed to maintaining the highest standards of information security. Currently, we’re undergoing rigorous testing to secure ISO 27001 certification in collaboration with our partners, ensuring compliance with industry-leading protocols. It’s our priority to constantly update our security practices.

Driving Success,
Cutting Costs, and,
Strengthening Customer Connections

Address your customer
inquiries 70% faster

Empower your business with a 24/7 AI chatbot as your dedicated customer service. Train it using your business guidelines for instant and efficient responses. No more waiting for your customers – inquiries are addressed instantly. Our diverse data input methods guarantee your chatbot is trained with the latest information, tailoring responses to your customers’ specific needs.

Reduce customer
service costs by 50%

Reduce hiring expenses on customer representatives without compromising service quality. Experience a significant drop in customer tickets, reducing workload and operational costs. Chatsistant automates data updates, eliminating the need for additional training costs.

Boost your sales by 40%

Immediately connect with visitors, increasing engagement and potential conversions. Collect visitors’ contact information. Don’t miss another lead! Gain actionable data from user interactions to improve your business strategy.

Our intuitive platform allows you to set up custom lead collection forms, ensuring you can track all interactions and follow up as needed. Seamlessly integrated into your workflow, our Lead Management System provides comprehensive insights and analytics to optimize your lead generation efforts. Stay ahead of the competition and maximize your business potential with ease.

Activate Live Chat Support
for Human Escalation

To step in as a human agent, navigate to the “Inbox” on Chatsistant. Look for the orange dot signaling a user requesting human assistance. Click it to engage directly with the user. Here, you can utilize features like real-time conversation and personalized support. Start typing your response in the chat input box. Once you send the first message, AI Supervisor and all AI Agents will be disabled, enabling you to have a direct conversation with the user. You can converse freely until the issue is resolved. To end the live chat session and transition the user back to the AI chatbot, simply click “End Live Chat”.

UNIQUE FEATURES

The first LLM-native framework,
for conversational AI applications

Agent Orchestration

Experience the first and most powerful LLM-native framework for building conversational Al solutions. Skip the tedious process and inflexible behavior of traditional chatbot platforms like Botpress and Voiceflow. Chatsistant allows you to create Al Agents that are trained specifically to handle certain tasks. Our Al supervisor monitors the conversation state in real-time and decides which Al Agent is most suited to handle the current user query.

Function Calling

More than just answering questions, Chatsistant’s AI Agents can use custom tools to take actions and access externally-hosted data sources in real-time via webhooks. Build AI chatbots that can book meetings, process order returns, collect customer contacts, send email alerts, or intelligently redirect to human support agents when needed. Join our community of chatbot developers and learn the best practices of writing your own custom functions to support your AI Agent operations..

Chunk Curation

Chatsistant uses Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) technology. Our built-in suite of AI-assisted debugging tools enable you to review, curate, clean, and enrich the training data after initial extraction is completed. Identify knowledge gaps and fine tune unsatisfactory answers so your chatbot continuously improves. Our human-in-the-loop approach to context refining allows for a significant upgrade in retrieval accuracy and reduction in hallucinations, so you can trust the AI to represent your brand and voice faithfully.

LLM-Powered smart AI chatbot for your business

Our intuitive platform allows you to set up custom lead collection forms, ensuring you can track all interactions and follow up as needed. Seamlessly integrated into your workflow, our Lead Management System provides comprehensive insights and analytics to optimize your lead generation efforts. Stay ahead of the competition and maximize your business potential with ease.

Core Features

Run your business
with LLM-Powered smart chatbots

Create your AI chatbot now >

Cover all customer journey
touchpoints automatically

Our AI Chatbot solution offers seamless integrations to cover all touchpoints of the customer journey, while also providing features like agent take-over and customizable rules, ensuring a smooth transition between automated and human-assisted interactions for personalized customer support.

Support

  • Instant Engagement: Automated Responses
  • Seamless Assistance: Agent Takeover
  • Consistent Support: Rule-Based Interactions
  • Streamlined Processes: Integration Capabilities
  • Plus More Features

Marketing

  • Lead Capture: Lead Generation
  • Campaign Promotion
  • Feedback Gathering: Customer Feedback Collection
  • Plus More Features

Sales

  • Product Information and Education
  • Upselling and Cross-selling Recommendations
  • Cart Assistance and Checkout Support
  • Plus More Features

Get more value from
your favorite tools

Seamless Integrations for Effortless Automation

 📢 Chatsistant integrates with your favorite tools, empowering effortless automation.

Our official verified partners natively integrated include:

🤝 Zapier (8,000+ apps including Chatsistant)
🤝 Make (2,000+ apps including Chatsistant)
🤖 Meta (native integration for Messenger, Instagram, WhatsApp – Beta)

3rd Party Integration

🔗 Boost.space: An alternative to Zapier and Make, integrated our API to connect with 2000+ platforms including Webex, Notion, Google, and Microsoft.

Omnichannel Integrations

automations through plug-and-play integrations.

Need a custom integration? Let us know

Frequently Asked Questions 🙋🏼

Got questions? We’ve got answers! Dive into our Frequently Asked Questions section for quick, clear responses to all your queries about Chatsistant, from features to usage tips.
What is Chatsistant?

Chatsistant is revolutionizing AI-powered conversations with a cutting-edge, customizable chatbot framework. Built on advanced LLMs and RAG technology, our platform empowers businesses to automate interactions, enhance customer engagement, and streamline workflows—all without coding. With seamless integrations, smart automation, and multi-agent capabilities, Chatsistant unlocks endless possibilities for innovation. Join us in shaping the future of AI-driven communication! 🚀

Does Chatsistant offer a free plan version of the framework?

Yes! Chatsistant offers a free forever plan called Launch Free for basic AI chatbot needs. Simply register for a free account, which activates a premium (test all features) 30-day free trial. During or after the trial, go to your subscription page to upgrade to the free forever plan. Make sure you are logged in to your account and click the top right corner dropdown menu to access your subscription on the popup window. Click Purchase to access our plans page. 🙂

Since this is an upgrade (even though it’s free), you’ll need to enter payment details to enable it. Your card won’t be charged—the total remains $0/month. You can remove your payment info when checking out or anytime if you choose.

What’s Included in Launch Free?

✅ ChatGPT 3.5 model + BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) via OpenAI
✅ 1 chatbot, 1 agent, 1 function call per agent
✅ Source training
✅ 25 free message credits/month (Unlimited with your own OpenAI API key)

For more, visit our pricing page.

Upgrade & Add-ons

  • Easily upgrade to paid plans anytime.
  • Buy message credits if you need more without opening an OpenAI account.
  • Affordable add-ons to scale as your business grows.

We’ve packed enough into our Launch Free plan so you can build an AI chatbot that acts as your best sales or customer service rep, cutting costs and increasing conversions.

Where is my data stored?

We are a Software-as-a-Service. This means that our app, along with data you upload to us, resides online. We use Amazon Web Services (AWS) for hosting. Our servers are located in Oregon, USA.

Does it support other languages?

Yes. Our service currently uses OpenAI’s GPT-3.5 and GPT-4 large language models (LLMs) for generative AI functionality. The models are trained on publicly available data across the internet in over 95 languages, so Chatsistant also supports over 95 languages.

What should my data look like?

We support most text document formats (.pdf, .docx, .txt, .md, .tex, .csv, .xlsx, .xls). You can also provide an URL for automatic scraping of text content (this is not automatically updated on target website refresh), or input your own text directly.

What is the current default AI model set for new chat bots created?

GPT-o3-mini (16 K) is our current default model for every new chatbot you create. It’s the “LLM-smart” choice we’ve settled on because it delivers strong reasoning chops while keeping credit burn low—perfect for launching prototypes and scaling from there.

Here’s the rundown in our own words:

  • Default setting: GPT-o3-mini with a 16 000-token window

  • Why it’s the default:

    • New mature LLM

    • Smart chain-of-thought reasoning

    • ~40 % fewer message credits than GPT-4o

    • Packs enough context (~8 000 words) for most workflows without overkill

  • Free Trial: You start on GPT-o3-mini, and you can try any model in our roster (up to 128 K tokens) at no extra charge

  • Plan tiers: Your plan determines which models and context sizes you can lock in as you grow

  • Switching models:

    1. Open your bot in the Agent Editor

    2. Hit the Model dropdown

    3. Pick GPT-4(o/4-mini), Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek—or stick with GPT-o3-mini

    4. Save, and your bot fires up on the new engine instantly

For the nitty-gritty on credit rates, context limits, and plan comparisons, check out our Pricing & Models page.

Does Chatsistant Support GPT-4, GPT-4o, GPT-4o-mini, GPT-o3-mini, and GPT-o1?

At Chatsistant, our back-end is engineered for unparalleled versatility in LLM selection, ensuring we stay ahead in AI innovation. Each model in our lineup is supercharged with up to 128k tokens—perfect for both lightning-fast interactions and deep, context-rich conversations. 🚀

OpenAI ChatGPT Models:

  • GPT-4: An advanced model for versatile, sophisticated interactions.
  • GPT-4o & GPT-4o-mini: Now updated to deliver up to 128k tokens for optimized performance.
  • GPT-o1 & GPT-o3 mini: Our newest cost-efficient variants that offer powerful performance while using about 40% fewer message credits compared to GPT-4o.

Anthropic Claude Suite:

  • Claude 3.5 Haiku: Available in both 4k for lightweight tasks and 128k for handling complex, data-intensive workflows.
  • Claude 3.7 Sonnet: Delivers enhanced reasoning and deep contextual insights for dynamic problem-solving.
  • Claude 3 Opus & Claude 3 Haiku: Trusted models offering robust performance across a wide range of AI applications.

Google Gemini Series:

  • Gemini 1.5 Flash: Engineered for rapid, high-speed processing with a full 128k token capacity.
  • Gemini 1.5 Pro: A scalable solution built for deep, context-rich operations.
  • Gemini 2.0 Flash: The latest addition, pushing the boundaries of speed and efficiency for real-time, multi-agent interactions.

DeepSeek Models:

  • DeepSeek-R1: Crafted for intricate, data-intensive workflows and enterprise-grade automation.
  • DeepSeek-V3: Balances rapid processing with profound contextual insights, ideal for dynamic, real-time interactions.

Looking Ahead:
We’re committed to continuous innovation, with plans to integrate even more advanced models—such as Meta LlaMA and other open-source alternatives—as they mature, ensuring you always have access to the best AI solutions available. 🌟

See the next FAQ about all LLMs integrated with Chatsistant or view our pricing page for more details.

What LLMs are integrated with Chatsistant? (GPT, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek?)

At Chatsistant, our back-end is engineered for unmatched versatility. Imagine an elite lineup of LLMs—each supercharged with up to 128k tokens—ready to tackle any challenge. Our platform comes with natively integrated large language models, giving you the flexibility to bring your own key (BYOK) or purchase message credits and token limits directly from us. See our pricing page for full details and breakdowns.

OpenAI ChatGPT

  • GPT-3.5-turbo: The reliable workhorse for both general and detailed responses.
  • GPT-4: Our advanced model delivering versatile and sophisticated interactions.
  • GPT-4o & GPT-4o-mini: Optimized for speed and efficiency—all powered by 128k tokens.
  • GPT-o3-mini & GPT-o1: Our newest cost-efficient variants, available in various token sizes to meet your needs.

Anthropic Claude

  • Claude 3.5 Haiku: Now available in a lightweight 4k version for quick tasks and a powerhouse 128k variant for complex, data-rich workflows.
  • Claude 3.7 Sonnet: Brings enhanced reasoning and deeper contextual insights for dynamic problem-solving.
  • Claude 3 Opus & Claude 3 Haiku: Robust models for high-performance, versatile operations.

Google Gemini

  • Gemini 1.5 Flash: Engineered for rapid, high-speed processing with a full 128k token capacity.
  • Gemini 1.5 Pro: Scalable for deep, context-rich operations.
  • Gemini 2.0 Flash: The latest addition, delivering blazing-fast responses and advanced context management—all with 128k tokens.

DeepSeek

  • DeepSeek-R1: Designed for advanced multi-agent coordination and deep contextual analysis in enterprise-grade workflows.
  • DeepSeek-V3: Strikes the perfect balance between rapid processing and profound contextual insights.

And that’s not all—our journey continues as we plan to integrate even more cutting-edge models like Meta LLaMA and other open-source alternatives as they mature. 

📌 For full details and pricing, visit Pricing.

Can I share a chatbot I created?

Input-wise, you as the administrator, and your collaborators are the only ones to the design, customization, and data of your chatbot. Output-wise, you can share your chatbot for anyone to use.

Can I give my chatbots instructions?

Yes. You can customize your chatbot to have different personas via our template-guided prompt engineering.

How can I add my chatbot to my website?

You can embed an iframe or add a chat bubble to the bottom right of your website. To do that, create a chatbot and click “Embed on website”.

Need More Help?

Feel free to email us at su*****@*********nt.com or reference our terms & conditions.

– Chatsistant Team

🛡️Privacy🔐

Ensuring your security and privacy is our top priority. We implement stringent measures to safeguard against data loss, unauthorized access, and misuse. Only authorized personnel, bound by confidentiality obligations, have access to your information.

Our systems undergo frequent testing and adhere to industry-leading standards, including the pursuit of ISO 27001 certification. We utilize encryption technology and comply with the Center for Internet Security’s Critical Security Controls. Additionally, we enforce specialized regulations and procedures, reinforced by comprehensive security training for our staff.

What will you do with my data?

We use your data to serve you directly and to optimize our services from an engineering perspective. We will never sell your data.

What measures are you taking to safeguard my data?

At Chatsistant, we’re committed to maintaining the highest standards of information security. Currently, we’re undergoing rigorous testing to secure ISO 27001 certification in collaboration with our partners, ensuring compliance with industry-leading protocols.

Drawing from our extensive experience managing data in a SaaS environment, we’ve combined forces with our sister company FireLizard IT, Web, and AI Solutions at TheFireLizard.com. Over the past two years, FireLizard has pioneered AI technology and services since 2023. Throughout this journey, including part of the development of our AI platform alongside collaboration with leading partners in AI and security, we’ve maintained an impeccable record with zero data breaches. Our focus remains steadfast on upholding the utmost security measures to safeguard your information.

Will you or OpenAI use my data for model training?

We do not train or fine-tune large language models (LLMs), and OpenAI has explicitly stated that it will not use data submitted by customers via its API endpoints to train or improve models. https://openai.com/policies/api-data-usage-policies

Do you send my data to third-parties?

We use OpenAI’s GPT-3.5 and GPT-4 language models. This means that text content within your uploads may, in unmarked chunks, be submitted to OpenAI as context when generating a response. We will never send your documents in its complete original form to any other organization, including OpenAI or its partners.

To better explain the associated implications, we like to use the analogy of mixing bags of legos (chunks of documents) and sending only a mix of blocks to OpenAI at a time. In the right combination, your blocks will form your original document (like a lego castle). However, when sending to OpenAI, your blocks can come from different documents, and they are sent alongside thousands of blocks from other users. There is basically no way (and no material benefit) for OpenAI to attempt reconstructing your blocks and learn of your original documents’ content. OpenAI has also explicitly stated that it will not use data submitted by customers via its API endpoints to train or improve models (https://openai.com/policies/api-data-usage-policies).

Do I need to download anything?

We are a Software-as-a-Service. This means that our app, along with data you upload to us, resides online.

We use Amazon Web Services (AWS) for storage and computation. Our servers are located in Oregon, USA.

Can you see documents I upload?

Our engineers have access to documents you upload. This is for debugging and user experience optimization purposes. All our engineers sign legal NDAs so they will not distribute your data in any way.

Is my data end-to-end encrypted?

Your data is not end-to-end encrypted while stored within our servers. This is because encryption of your data precludes us from being able to extract any meaningful information from it, thereby disabling pretty much all our features. This is true for text analytics platforms in general, including OpenAI itself. Anyone that claims to have end-to-end encryption while offering you similar capabilities is lying.

Need More Help?

Feel free to email us at le***@*********nt.com or reference our terms & conditions.

– Chatsistant Team

We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your interactions with our website and Services, including when you reach out to us on chat. This comprises traffic analysis, delivering personalized content, and supporting our marketing efforts. By accessing our website, interacting with our Services, you agree to let us and our partners employ cookies and related technologies on your computer or devices. Click the Cookies Policy to check how you can control the use of cookies through your device. To understand how we process your data, including through cookies, and interactions with us, please read our Privacy Policy.
